capabilities.target: serial device paths such as /dev/tty*, /dev/cu*, and COM*
capabilities.justification: Host transport must read Board VM response bytes from a user-selected serial device.

capabilities.target: serial device paths such as /dev/tty*, /dev/cu*, and COM*
capabilities.justification: Host transport must write Board VM request bytes to a user-selected serial device.

justification: This host crate is the explicit real-hardware serial boundary. It only opens user-selected serial ports and delegates protocol framing to pure Board VM crates.
